overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player follows a van along wet streets illuminated by orange neon lights, crosses an intersection at Longshore N, and continues through an industrial area with overhead power lines and under a metal overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon street lighting

events.description: white delivery van ahead signals and turns left at the approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a white delivery van

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving ahead with brake lights illuminated, preparing to turn left

entered.detail: white commercial van with red taillights and illuminated brake lights
tall street lamps emitting warm orange neon light
rain-soaked multi-lane road reflecting orange neon lights
paved pedestrian walkway with concrete curb
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows visible through the haze
crisscrossing electrical wires between utility poles
raised concrete wall containing trees and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban sidewalk at night, illuminated by orange neon street lights. The camera follows a white delivery van driving ahead on the adjacent road. Tall glass buildings loom in the foggy distance while power lines crisscross overhead. The van signals and turns left as the camera approaches the intersection.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the crosswalk entering the intersection
sedan drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the Longshore N intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead across the street in the same direction
dark sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: illuminated orange street sign reading 'Longshore N' mounted on metal pole
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
vertical black pole with traffic signal lights

segments.scene_description: The camera steps onto the crosswalk at the Longshore N intersection, leaving the sidewalk behind. An illuminated street sign marks the location overhead. A pedestrian walks ahead across the wide intersection while a sedan passes through from the left. The ground transitions from concrete sidewalk to painted asphalt crosswalk stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with concrete planters and pedestrian traffic

events.description: steps onto the opposite sidewalk after crossing the intersection
slight left turn to follow the sidewalk curve around the planter

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and concrete planters with trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction passing by on the left
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: bright red fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
black metal fence running along the right edge of the sidewalk
tall wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and electrical wires

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the camera steps onto the opposite sidewalk where pedestrian density increases. The path curves slightly left around a concrete planter wall with trees. A red fire hydrant stands out on the right near a metal railing. Other pedestrians walk in both directions, and the road is now visible to the right rather than the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with trash accumulation and overhead power infrastructure

events.description: sidewalk becomes more industrial with visible trash bags and debris piled against the wall
passing into darker shadow area as the overpass approaches

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial section with trash piles and prominent overhead power lines

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: black garbage bags and scattered debris accumulated against the concrete wall
large metal bridge structure with support beams spanning across the road ahead
tall metal lattice tower supporting multiple high-voltage power lines

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a more industrial character with trash bags piled against the left wall and prominent power line towers visible. The camera walks toward a large metal overpass structure that spans the road ahead. The lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as the camera approaches the covered area. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath metal overpass with vehicle traffic

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the metal overpass structure
van with bright headlights drives past on the right side under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass as vehicles pass by with headlights illuminating the tunnel-like space

notable_agents.action: van with bright headlights driving under the overpass from behind and passing by

entered.detail: thick vertical metal support columns holding up the overhead bridge structure
orange neon light strips mounted underneath the overpass deck

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered area beneath the metal overpass, transitioning from open sky to a tunnel-like environment. Orange neon lights mounted under the bridge deck illuminate the path. Thick support beams line the walkway. A van with bright headlights drives past on the right, its lights cutting through the dim underpass. The trash bags remain visible along the left wall as the camera continues forward through the covered section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked dystopian city that transitions from a neon-lit commercial district into a shadowed industrial underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk under orange neon lights, following a white delivery van as it signals a left turn toward a foggy skyline of glass buildings. As the camera steps off the curb and crosses the Longshore N intersection, the ground shifts from concrete to painted asphalt stripes while pedestrians and vehicles navigate the wide crossing. The scene then curves around a concrete planter and a red fire hydrant, moving past increasing crowds before the environment opens into a grittier industrial zone marked by piled trash bags and towering power lines. Finally, the camera moves from the open night sky into the oppressive enclosure of a metal overpass, where orange lights and the glare of passing headlights illuminate a tunnel-like walkway lined with thick support beams.
